title: Widget limitation: one column type per chart

posts.author: RomanSUTEAU (Roman Suteau )
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create a pie chart in a Monday.com dashboard using data from multiple columns within a single board.

However, Monday.com currently only allows one column to be selected per connected board when configuring chart widgets. This limitation makes it impossible to aggregate or visualize values from several columns in the same chart, even though all the data resides in the same board.
